title: BENFEI Laptop Stand with USB C 7in1 Docking Station,HDMI 4K@60Hz,1*SD 1*Micro SD,100W Power Delivery,10Gbps 1*USB C 3.2 and 2*USB A 3.2 Compatible with MacBook Pro/Air, iPad Pro, XPS, Thinkpad
features: 【Ergonomic Design】BENFEI Laptop stand can be easily adjusted to comfortable height and angle based on your actual need with sturdy and supportive. Height adjust from maximum 178mm to minimum 68mm. Affordable laptop weight is 4.5 kilogram, product dimension is 250*240*53.3mm.

【Stable & Durable】Laptop stand is made of aluminum alloy, thus gives the stand a more stable performance, Anti-skid silicone can protects your laptop from sliding. Thanks to BENFEI's end-to-end in-house aluminum production capability, in-house PCBA and assembly capability, give your best solution of laptop stand with docking station.

【Muti-Function】Expand your laptop with HDMI 4K@60Hz, 1*SD 1*Micro SD, 100W Power Delivery, 10Gbps 1*USB C 3.2 and 2*USB A 3.2, just plug in and play, make your desktop more clean. 4K@60Hz HDMI keeping every incredible moment detailed and ultra vivid. Support up to 85W USB C pass-through charging via Type-C port to keep your laptop powered.

【10Gbps High-speed data and 160MB/sec SD Micro SD】Transfer files and from your laptop at speeds up to 10Gbps with USB A/C 3.2 port.With latest USB Type-C port, fully enjoy the transfer rates in UHS-I mode up to 160MB/sec, backward Compatible with USB 2.0/1.1. Browse and view photos instantly on your USB-C laptops.The SD card and Micro SD card could Simultaneously Read and Write (NOTE: The final data speed is decided by the card and USB slot Type ).

【Wide Compatibility】For HDMI video output, compatible with 2023/2022/2021/2020/2019 MacBook Pro iMac MacBook, Surface Book 2, Surface Go, HP Envy 13, Pixelbook, Galaxy Book, Dell XPS 15 / XPS 13, Chromebook, Chromebook Pixel, Intel NUC and others (see detailed product description section below)
